goal: val add_comm: a:int -> b:int -> Lemma (a + b == b + a)
tactic_proof: let add_comm a b = ()

goal: val add_assoc: a:int -> b:int -> c:int -> Lemma ((a + b) + c == a + (b + c))
tactic_proof: let add_assoc a b c = ()

goal: val mul_comm: a:int -> b:int -> Lemma (a * b == b * a)
tactic_proof: let mul_comm a b = ()

goal: val mul_assoc: a:int -> b:int -> c:int -> Lemma ((a * b) * c == a * (b * c))
tactic_proof: let mul_assoc a b c = ()

goal: val distributive: a:int -> b:int -> c:int -> Lemma (a * (b + c) == a * b + a * c)
tactic_proof: let distributive a b c = ()

goal: val add_zero_r: a:int -> Lemma (a + 0 == a)
tactic_proof: let add_zero_r a = ()

goal: val mul_one_r: a:int -> Lemma (a * 1 == a)
tactic_proof: let mul_one_r a = ()

goal: val mul_zero_r: a:int -> Lemma (a * 0 == 0)
tactic_proof: let mul_zero_r a = ()

goal: val pow_add: b:nat -> m:nat -> n:nat -> Lemma (ensures pow b (m + n) == pow b m * pow b n) (decreases m)
tactic_proof: let rec pow_add b m n = if m = 0 then () else pow_add b (m - 1) n

goal: val pow_mul: b:nat -> m:nat -> n:nat -> Lemma (ensures pow b (m * n) == pow (pow b m) n) (decreases n)
tactic_proof: let rec pow_mul b m n = if n = 0 then () else (pow_add b m (m * (n - 1)); pow_mul b m (n - 1))

goal: val mod_add: a:int -> b:int -> n:pos -> Lemma ((a + b) % n == ((a % n) + (b % n)) % n)
tactic_proof: let mod_add a b n = FStar.Math.Lemmas.lemma_mod_plus_distr_l a b n

goal: val div_exact: a:nat -> b:pos -> Lemma (requires a % b == 0) (ensures a / b * b == a)
tactic_proof: let div_exact a b = FStar.Math.Lemmas.lemma_div_exact a b

goal: val append_nil: #a:Type -> l:list a -> Lemma (l @ [] == l)
tactic_proof: let rec append_nil #a l = match l with | [] -> () | _::tl -> append_nil tl

goal: val append_assoc: #a:Type -> l1:list a -> l2:list a -> l3:list a -> Lemma ((l1 @ l2) @ l3 == l1 @ (l2 @ l3))
tactic_proof: let rec append_assoc #a l1 l2 l3 = match l1 with | [] -> () | _::tl -> append_assoc tl l2 l3

goal: val length_append: #a:Type -> l1:list a -> l2:list a -> Lemma (length (l1 @ l2) == length l1 + length l2)
tactic_proof: let rec length_append #a l1 l2 = match l1 with | [] -> () | _::tl -> length_append tl l2

goal: val rev_rev: #a:Type -> l:list a -> Lemma (rev (rev l) == l)
tactic_proof: let rec rev_rev #a l = match l with | [] -> () | hd::tl -> rev_append_rev tl [hd]; rev_rev tl

goal: val map_append: #a:Type -> #b:Type -> f:(a -> b) -> l1:list a -> l2:list a -> Lemma (map f (l1 @ l2) == map f l1 @ map f l2)
tactic_proof: let rec map_append #a #b f l1 l2 = match l1 with | [] -> () | _::tl -> map_append f tl l2

goal: val length_map: #a:Type -> #b:Type -> f:(a -> b) -> l:list a -> Lemma (length (map f l) == length l)
tactic_proof: let rec length_map #a #b f l = match l with | [] -> () | _::tl -> length_map f tl

goal: val mem_append: #a:eqtype -> x:a -> l1:list a -> l2:list a -> Lemma (mem x (l1 @ l2) <==> mem x l1 || mem x l2)
tactic_proof: let rec mem_append #a x l1 l2 = match l1 with | [] -> () | _::tl -> mem_append x tl l2

goal: val filter_append: #a:Type -> f:(a -> bool) -> l1:list a -> l2:list a -> Lemma (filter f (l1 @ l2) == filter f l1 @ filter f l2)
tactic_proof: let rec filter_append #a f l1 l2 = match l1 with | [] -> () | hd::tl -> filter_append f tl l2

goal: val fold_left_append: #a:Type -> #b:Type -> f:(b -> a -> b) -> init:b -> l1:list a -> l2:list a -> Lemma (fold_left f init (l1 @ l2) == fold_left f (fold_left f init l1) l2)
tactic_proof: let rec fold_left_append #a #b f init l1 l2 = match l1 with | [] -> () | hd::tl -> fold_left_append f (f init hd) tl l2

goal: val for_all_append: #a:Type -> f:(a -> bool) -> l1:list a -> l2:list a -> Lemma (for_all f (l1 @ l2) <==> for_all f l1 && for_all f l2)
tactic_proof: let rec for_all_append #a f l1 l2 = match l1 with | [] -> () | _::tl -> for_all_append f tl l2

goal: val aead_encrypt_decrypt: k:key -> n:nonce -> p:plaintext -> ad:aad -> Lemma (ensures (let c = aead_encrypt k n p ad in aead_decrypt k n c ad == Some p))
val hmac_verify: k:key -> m:msg -> t:tag -> Lemma (requires t == hmac k m) (ensures verify_hmac k m t == true)
val hash_collision_resistance: m1:msg -> m2:msg -> Lemma (requires m1 <> m2) (ensures hash m1 <> hash m2) [SMTPat (hash m1); SMTPat (hash m2)]
val kdf_extract_length: salt:bytes -> ikm:bytes -> Lemma (ensures length (kdf_extract salt ikm) == hash_length)
val chacha20_involutive: k:key -> n:nonce -> ctr:nat -> p:bytes -> Lemma (ensures chacha20 k n ctr (chacha20 k n ctr p) == p)
val incr: r:ref int -> ST unit (requires fun h -> True) (ensures fun h0 _ h1 -> sel h1 r == sel h0 r + 1)
tactic_proof: let incr r = r := !r + 1

goal: val swap: r1:ref int -> r2:ref int -> ST unit (requires fun h -> True) (ensures fun h0 _ h1 -> sel h1 r1 == sel h0 r2 /\ sel h1 r2 == sel h0 r1)
tactic_proof: let swap r1 r2 = let t = !r1 in r1 := !r2; r2 := t

goal: val factorial: n:nat -> Tot (r:nat{r >= 1})
tactic_proof: let rec factorial n = if n = 0 then 1 else n * factorial (n - 1)

goal: val fibonacci: n:nat -> Tot nat (decreases n)
tactic_proof: let rec fibonacci n = if n <= 1 then n else fibonacci (n - 1) + fibonacci (n - 2)

goal: val alloc_and_free: n:nat -> ST unit (requires fun h -> True) (ensures fun h0 _ h1 -> modifies Set.empty h0 h1)
tactic_proof: let alloc_and_free n = let r = alloc n in free r

goal: val nat_positive: n:nat{n > 0} -> Tot (r:nat{r >= 0})
tactic_proof: let nat_positive n = n - 1

goal: val bounded_add: a:nat{a < 100} -> b:nat{b < 100} -> Tot (r:nat{r < 200})
tactic_proof: let bounded_add a b = a + b

goal: val safe_div: a:int -> b:int{b <> 0} -> Tot int
tactic_proof: let safe_div a b = a / b

goal: val vector_index: #n:nat -> v:vector n -> i:nat{i < n} -> Tot elem
tactic_proof: let vector_index #n v i = Seq.index v i

goal: val sorted_insert: x:int -> l:list int{sorted l} -> Tot (r:list int{sorted r /\ length r == length l + 1})
val non_empty_head: #a:Type -> l:list a{Cons? l} -> Tot a
tactic_proof: let non_empty_head #a l = match l with | hd::_ -> hd

goal: val matrix_mult: #m:nat -> #n:nat -> #p:nat -> matrix m n -> matrix n p -> Tot (matrix m p)
val well_typed_eval: #t:typ -> e:exp{has_type e t} -> Tot (v:value{value_type v t})
val ackermann: m:nat -> n:nat -> Tot nat (decreases %[m; n])
tactic_proof: let rec ackermann m n = if m = 0 then n + 1 else if n = 0 then ackermann (m - 1) 1 else ackermann (m - 1) (ackermann m (n - 1))

goal: val gcd: a:nat -> b:nat{a > 0 || b > 0} -> Tot (r:pos) (decreases b)
tactic_proof: let rec gcd a b = if b = 0 then a else gcd b (a % b)

goal: val collatz_steps: n:pos -> Tot nat (decreases %[n; if n = 1 then 0 else 1])

val mutual_even: n:nat -> Tot bool (decreases n)
val mutual_odd: n:nat -> Tot bool (decreases n)
tactic_proof:
let rec mutual_even n = if n = 0 then true else mutual_odd (n - 1)
and mutual_odd n = if n = 0 then false else mutual_even (n - 1)

goal: val seq_append_length: #a:Type -> s1:Seq.seq a -> s2:Seq.seq a -> Lemma (Seq.length (Seq.append s1 s2) == Seq.length s1 + Seq.length s2)
tactic_proof: let seq_append_length #a s1 s2 = Seq.lemma_len_append s1 s2

goal: val seq_slice_slice: #a:Type -> s:Seq.seq a -> i:nat -> j:nat{i <= j} -> k:nat -> l:nat{k <= l /\ l <= j - i} -> Lemma (Seq.slice (Seq.slice s i j) k l == Seq.slice s (i + k) (i + l))
tactic_proof: let seq_slice_slice #a s i j k l = Seq.lemma_slice_slice s i j k l

goal: val seq_create_index: #a:Type -> n:nat -> v:a -> i:nat{i < n} -> Lemma (Seq.index (Seq.create n v) i == v)
tactic_proof: let seq_create_index #a n v i = ()

goal: val seq_upd_index: #a:Type -> s:Seq.seq a -> i:nat{i < Seq.length s} -> v:a -> j:nat{j < Seq.length s} -> Lemma (Seq.index (Seq.upd s i v) j == (if i = j then v else Seq.index s j))
tactic_proof: let seq_upd_index #a s i v j = ()

goal: val seq_equal_intro: #a:Type -> s1:Seq.seq a -> s2:Seq.seq a -> Lemma (requires Seq.length s1 == Seq.length s2 /\ (forall (i:nat{i < Seq.length s1}). Seq.index s1 i == Seq.index s2 i)) (ensures Seq.equal s1 s2)
tactic_proof: let seq_equal_intro #a s1 s2 = Seq.lemma_eq_intro s1 s2

goal: val seq_mem_append: #a:eqtype -> x:a -> s1:Seq.seq a -> s2:Seq.seq a -> Lemma (Seq.mem x (Seq.append s1 s2) <==> Seq.mem x s1 || Seq.mem x s2)
tactic_proof: let seq_mem_append #a x s1 s2 = Seq.lemma_mem_append s1 s2

goal: val seq_count_append: #a:eqtype -> x:a -> s1:Seq.seq a -> s2:Seq.seq a -> Lemma (Seq.count x (Seq.append s1 s2) == Seq.count x s1 + Seq.count x s2)
tactic_proof: let seq_count_append #a x s1 s2 = Seq.lemma_count_append x s1 s2

goal: val seq_sort_permutation: #a:eqtype -> f:(a -> a -> Tot int) -> s:Seq.seq a -> Lemma (ensures Seq.permutation a (Seq.sortWith f s) s)
tactic_proof: let seq_sort_permutation #a f s = Seq.lemma_sortWith_permutation f s

goal: val seq_unsnoc: #a:Type -> s:Seq.seq a{Seq.length s > 0} -> Tot (Seq.seq a & a)
tactic_proof: let seq_unsnoc #a s = Seq.un_snoc s

goal: val seq_cons_head_tail: #a:Type -> s:Seq.seq a{Seq.length s > 0} -> Lemma (Seq.cons (Seq.head s) (Seq.tail s) == s)
tactic_proof: let seq_cons_head_tail #a s = Seq.lemma_cons_head_tail s

goal: val seq_map_seq: #a:Type -> #b:Type -> f:(a -> Tot b) -> s:Seq.seq a -> i:nat{i < Seq.length s} -> Lemma (Seq.index (Seq.map_seq f s) i == f (Seq.index s i))
tactic_proof: let seq_map_seq #a #b f s i = Seq.map_seq_index f s i

goal: val seq_init_index: #a:Type -> n:nat -> f:(i:nat{i < n} -> Tot a) -> i:nat{i < n} -> Lemma (Seq.index (Seq.init n f) i == f i)
tactic_proof: let seq_init_index #a n f i = Seq.init_index n f i

goal: val buffer_live: #a:Type -> h:HS.mem -> b:B.buffer a -> Lemma (requires B.live h b) (ensures B.length b >= 0 /\ B.live h b)
tactic_proof: let buffer_live #a h b = ()

goal: val buffer_read_write: #a:Type -> b:B.buffer a -> i:UInt32.t{UInt32.v i < B.length b} -> v:a -> h0:HS.mem -> Lemma (requires B.live h0 b) (ensures (let h1 = B.g_upd b (UInt32.v i) v h0 in B.get h1 b (UInt32.v i) == v))
tactic_proof: let buffer_read_write #a b i v h0 = ()

goal: val buffer_modifies_only: #a:Type -> b:B.buffer a -> h0:HS.mem -> h1:HS.mem -> Lemma (requires B.modifies (B.loc_buffer b) h0 h1) (ensures B.modifies (B.loc_buffer b) h0 h1)
tactic_proof: let buffer_modifies_only #a b h0 h1 = ()

goal: val buffer_disjoint: #a:Type -> #b:Type -> b1:B.buffer a -> b2:B.buffer b -> h0:HS.mem -> h1:HS.mem -> v:a -> Lemma (requires B.live h0 b1 /\ B.live h0 b2 /\ B.disjoint b1 b2 /\ B.modifies (B.loc_buffer b1) h0 h1) (ensures B.as_seq h1 b2 == B.as_seq h0 b2)
tactic_proof: let buffer_disjoint #a #b b1 b2 h0 h1 v = B.modifies_buffer_elim b2 (B.loc_buffer b1) h0 h1

goal: val buffer_as_seq_gsub: #a:Type -> b:B.buffer a -> i:UInt32.t -> len:UInt32.t{UInt32.v i + UInt32.v len <= B.length b} -> h:HS.mem -> Lemma (requires B.live h b) (ensures B.as_seq h (B.gsub b i len) == Seq.slice (B.as_seq h b) (UInt32.v i) (UInt32.v i + UInt32.v len))
tactic_proof: let buffer_as_seq_gsub #a b i len h = ()

goal: val buffer_concat: #a:Type -> b1:B.buffer a -> b2:B.buffer a -> h:HS.mem -> Lemma (requires B.live h b1 /\ B.live h b2 /\ B.disjoint b1 b2) (ensures B.length b1 + B.length b2 >= 0)
tactic_proof: let buffer_concat #a b1 b2 h = ()

goal: val stack_alloc_free: unit -> ST unit (requires fun h -> True) (ensures fun h0 _ h1 -> modifies Set.empty h0 h1)
tactic_proof: let stack_alloc_free () = push_frame (); let b = B.alloca 0uy 16ul in let _ = b.(0ul) in pop_frame ()

goal: val buffer_frame: #a:Type -> #b:Type -> buf:B.buffer a -> other:B.buffer b -> h0:HS.mem -> h1:HS.mem -> Lemma (requires B.live h0 buf /\ B.live h0 other /\ B.disjoint buf other /\ B.modifies (B.loc_buffer other) h0 h1) (ensures B.as_seq h0 buf == B.as_seq h1 buf /\ B.live h1 buf)
tactic_proof: let buffer_frame #a #b buf other h0 h1 = B.modifies_buffer_elim buf (B.loc_buffer other) h0 h1

goal: val buffer_loc_disjoint: #a:Type -> #b:Type -> b1:B.buffer a -> b2:B.buffer b -> Lemma (requires B.disjoint b1 b2) (ensures B.loc_disjoint (B.loc_buffer b1) (B.loc_buffer b2))
tactic_proof: let buffer_loc_disjoint #a #b b1 b2 = B.loc_disjoint_buffer b1 b2

goal: val buffer_length_gsub: #a:Type -> b:B.buffer a -> i:UInt32.t -> len:UInt32.t{UInt32.v i + UInt32.v len <= B.length b} -> Lemma (B.length (B.gsub b i len) == UInt32.v len)
tactic_proof: let buffer_length_gsub #a b i len = ()

goal: val witnessed_stable: #a:Type -> #rel:Preorder.preorder a -> r:mref a rel -> p:(a -> Type0){stable p rel} -> h:HS.mem -> Lemma (requires p (HS.sel h r)) (ensures witnessed r p)
tactic_proof: let witnessed_stable #a #rel r p h = gst_witness r p

goal: val recall_witnessed: #a:Type -> #rel:Preorder.preorder a -> r:mref a rel -> p:(a -> Type0){stable p rel} -> ST unit (requires fun h -> witnessed r p) (ensures fun h0 _ h1 -> h0 == h1 /\ p (HS.sel h1 r))
tactic_proof: let recall_witnessed #a #rel r p = gst_recall r p

goal: val gst_witness: #a:Type -> #rel:Preorder.preorder a -> r:mref a rel -> p:(a -> Type0){stable p rel} -> ST unit (requires fun h -> p (HS.sel h r)) (ensures fun h0 _ h1 -> h0 == h1 /\ witnessed r p)
tactic_proof: let gst_witness #a #rel r p = witness_p r p

goal: val stable_predicate: #a:Type -> #rel:Preorder.preorder a -> p:(a -> Type0) -> Lemma (requires forall (x y : a). p x /\ rel x y ==> p y) (ensures stable p rel)
tactic_proof: let stable_predicate #a #rel p = ()

goal: val monotonic_ref_read: #a:Type -> #rel:Preorder.preorder a -> r:mref a rel -> ST a (requires fun h -> True) (ensures fun h0 v h1 -> h0 == h1 /\ v == HS.sel h1 r)
tactic_proof: let monotonic_ref_read #a #rel r = !r

goal: val monotonic_ref_write: #a:Type -> #rel:Preorder.preorder a -> r:mref a rel -> v:a -> ST unit (requires fun h -> rel (HS.sel h r) v) (ensures fun h0 _ h1 -> HS.sel h1 r == v /\ modifies (Set.singleton (HS.frameOf r)) h0 h1)
tactic_proof: let monotonic_ref_write #a #rel r v = r := v

goal: val token_fresh: #a:Type -> #rel:Preorder.preorder a -> r:mref a rel -> h:HS.mem -> Lemma (requires HS.contains h r) (ensures HS.frameOf r `HS.is_in` HS.get_hmap h)
tactic_proof: let token_fresh #a #rel r h = ()

goal: val region_contains: #a:Type -> #rel:Preorder.preorder a -> r:mref a rel -> h:HS.mem -> Lemma (requires HS.contains h r) (ensures HS.live_region h (HS.frameOf r))
tactic_proof: let region_contains #a #rel r h = ()

goal: val norm_spec: a:nat -> b:nat -> Lemma (normalize_term (a + 0) == a)
tactic_proof: let norm_spec a b = assert (normalize_term (a + 0) == a) by (let _ = norm [delta; zeta; primops] in trefl ())

goal: val canon_semiring: a:int -> b:int -> c:int -> Lemma (a * (b + c) == a * b + a * c)
tactic_proof: let canon_semiring a b c = assert (a * (b + c) == a * b + a * c) by (canon_semiring_int ())

goal: val trefl_lemma: a:int -> Lemma (a == a)
tactic_proof: let trefl_lemma a = assert (a == a) by trefl ()

goal: val mapply_lemma: a:int -> b:int -> Lemma (requires a == b) (ensures a + 0 == b)
tactic_proof: let mapply_lemma a b = assert (a + 0 == b) by (mapply (`FStar.Math.Lemmas.add_zero_r); assumption ())

goal: val smt_lemma: a:nat -> b:nat -> Lemma (a + b >= a)
tactic_proof: let smt_lemma a b = assert (a + b >= a) by smt ()

goal: val pointwise_lemma: a:int -> b:int -> c:int -> Lemma ((a + b) + c == a + (b + c))
tactic_proof: let pointwise_lemma a b c = assert ((a + b) + c == a + (b + c)) by (pointwise (fun () -> trefl ()); trefl ())

goal: val grewrite_lemma: a:int -> b:int -> Lemma (requires a == b) (ensures a + 1 == b + 1)
tactic_proof: let grewrite_lemma a b = assert (a + 1 == b + 1) by (grewrite (quote a) (quote b); assumption (); trefl ())

goal: val tadmit_placeholder: a:int -> b:int -> Lemma (a * b == b * a)
tactic_proof: let tadmit_placeholder a b = assert (a * b == b * a) by tadmit ()

goal: val vector_head: #a:Type -> #n:nat{n > 0} -> v:vector a (n + 1) -> Tot a
tactic_proof: let vector_head #a #n v = Seq.index v 0

goal: val vector_cons_snoc: #a:Type -> #n:nat -> x:a -> v:vector a n -> Lemma (length (cons x v) == n + 1 /\ head (cons x v) == x)
tactic_proof: let vector_cons_snoc #a #n x v = ()

goal: val matrix_mult_assoc: #m:nat -> #n:nat -> #p:nat -> #q:nat -> a:matrix m n -> b:matrix n p -> c:matrix p q -> Lemma (mat_mult (mat_mult a b) c == mat_mult a (mat_mult b c))
val sized_list_append: #a:Type -> #m:nat -> #n:nat -> l1:sized_list a m -> l2:sized_list a n -> Tot (sized_list a (m + n))
tactic_proof: let rec sized_list_append #a #m #n l1 l2 = match l1 with | SNil -> l2 | SCons x xs -> SCons x (sized_list_append xs l2)

goal: val bounded_nat_add: #bound:nat -> a:bounded_nat bound -> b:bounded_nat bound{a + b <= bound} -> Tot (bounded_nat bound)
tactic_proof: let bounded_nat_add #bound a b = a + b

goal: val indexed_sum: #n:nat -> f:(i:nat{i < n} -> Tot nat) -> Tot nat (decreases n)
tactic_proof: let rec indexed_sum #n f = if n = 0 then 0 else f (n - 1) + indexed_sum #(n - 1) (fun i -> f i)

goal: val heterogeneous_list: ts:list Type -> Type
tactic_proof: let rec heterogeneous_list ts = match ts with | [] -> unit | t :: rest -> t & heterogeneous_list rest

goal: val witness_exists: #a:Type -> #p:(a -> Type0) -> x:a -> pf:p x -> Tot (dtuple2 a p)
tactic_proof: let witness_exists #a #p x pf = (| x, pf |)

goal: val refinement_subtyping: x:nat{x > 5} -> Tot (y:int{y > 0})
tactic_proof: let refinement_subtyping x = x

goal: val coercion_lemma: #a:Type -> #p:(a -> Type0) -> #q:(a -> Type0) -> x:a{p x} -> Lemma (requires forall (y:a). p y ==> q y) (ensures q x)
tactic_proof: let coercion_lemma #a #p #q x = ()

goal: val u8_add_mod: a:UInt8.t -> b:UInt8.t -> Lemma (UInt8.v (UInt8.add_mod a b) == (UInt8.v a + UInt8.v b) % 256)
tactic_proof: let u8_add_mod a b = ()

goal: val u32_shift_left: a:UInt32.t -> s:UInt32.t{UInt32.v s < 32} -> Lemma (UInt32.v (UInt32.shift_left a s) == (UInt32.v a * pow2 (UInt32.v s)) % pow2 32)
val u64_logand_comm: a:UInt64.t -> b:UInt64.t -> Lemma (UInt64.logand a b == UInt64.logand b a)
tactic_proof: let u64_logand_comm a b = UInt64.logand_commutative a b

goal: val i32_add_overflow: a:Int32.t -> b:Int32.t -> Lemma (requires Int32.v a + Int32.v b < pow2 31 /\ Int32.v a + Int32.v b >= -(pow2 31)) (ensures Int32.v (Int32.add a b) == Int32.v a + Int32.v b)
val cast_u8_u32: a:UInt8.t -> Lemma (UInt32.v (FStar.Int.Cast.uint8_to_uint32 a) == UInt8.v a)
val u32_sub_mod: a:UInt32.t -> b:UInt32.t -> Lemma (UInt32.v (UInt32.sub_mod a b) == (UInt32.v a - UInt32.v b) % pow2 32)
val bytes_of_u32: n:UInt32.t -> Lemma (ensures length (uint32_to_bytes n) == 4)
val u16_max_bound: a:UInt16.t -> Lemma (UInt16.v a < 65536)
tactic_proof: let u16_max_bound a = ()

goal: val parser_ret: #a:Type -> v:a -> parser a
tactic_proof: let parser_ret #a v = fun input -> Some (v, input)

goal: val parser_bind: #a:Type -> #b:Type -> p:parser a -> f:(a -> parser b) -> parser b
tactic_proof: let parser_bind #a #b p f = fun input -> match p input with | None -> None | Some (v, rest) -> f v rest

goal: val parser_map: #a:Type -> #b:Type -> f:(a -> b) -> p:parser a -> parser b
tactic_proof: let parser_map #a #b f p = parser_bind p (fun v -> parser_ret (f v))

goal: val parser_alt: #a:Type -> p1:parser a -> p2:parser a -> parser a
tactic_proof: let parser_alt #a p1 p2 = fun input -> match p1 input with | Some r -> Some r | None -> p2 input

goal: val parser_many: #a:Type -> p:parser a -> parser (list a)
tactic_proof: let rec parser_many #a p = parser_alt (parser_bind p (fun v -> parser_bind (parser_many p) (fun vs -> parser_ret (v :: vs)))) (parser_ret [])

goal: val parser_char: c:char -> parser char
tactic_proof: let parser_char c = fun input -> if Seq.length input > 0 && Seq.index input 0 = c then Some (c, Seq.slice input 1 (Seq.length input)) else None

goal: val parser_digit: parser nat
tactic_proof: let parser_digit = parser_bind (parser_satisfy is_digit) (fun c -> parser_ret (char_to_nat c))

goal: val parser_satisfy: (char -> bool) -> parser char
tactic_proof: let parser_satisfy f = fun input -> if Seq.length input > 0 && f (Seq.index input 0) then Some (Seq.index input 0, Seq.slice input 1 (Seq.length input)) else None

goal: val sm_transition: st:state -> ev:event -> Tot state
tactic_proof: let sm_transition st ev = match st, ev with | Init, Start -> Running | Running, Stop -> Done | s, _ -> s

goal: val sm_invariant: st:state -> Tot bool
tactic_proof: let sm_invariant st = st <> Error

goal: val sm_step_preserves: st:state -> ev:event -> Lemma (requires sm_invariant st) (ensures sm_invariant (sm_transition st ev))
tactic_proof: let sm_step_preserves st ev = ()

goal: val sm_reachable: events:list event -> Tot state (decreases events)
tactic_proof: let rec sm_reachable events = match events with | [] -> Init | e :: es -> sm_transition (sm_reachable es) e

goal: val sm_trace_valid: events:list event -> Lemma (ensures sm_invariant (sm_reachable events)) (decreases events)
tactic_proof: let rec sm_trace_valid events = match events with | [] -> () | e :: es -> sm_trace_valid es; sm_step_preserves (sm_reachable es) e

goal: val sm_deadlock_free: st:state -> Lemma (requires st <> Done) (ensures exists (ev:event). sm_transition st ev <> st)
val handshake_complete: c:client -> s:server -> Lemma (requires valid_hello c /\ valid_hello s) (ensures handshake_result c s == Success)
val message_integrity: k:key -> m:msg -> Lemma (ensures verify k m (mac k m) == true)
tactic_proof: let message_integrity k m = ()

goal: val nonce_fresh: n:nonce -> log:list nonce -> Lemma (requires not (mem n log)) (ensures fresh n log)
tactic_proof: let nonce_fresh n log = ()

goal: val session_key_derive: psk:key -> c_rand:bytes -> s_rand:bytes -> Lemma (ensures length (derive psk c_rand s_rand) == 32)
val replay_protection: n:nonce -> log:list nonce -> Lemma (requires mem n log) (ensures reject n log)
tactic_proof: let replay_protection n log = ()

goal: val forward_secrecy: sk:key -> pk:key -> Lemma (requires ephemeral sk) (ensures not (recoverable sk pk))

val array_swap: #a:Type -> b:buffer a -> i:nat -> j:nat -> ST unit (requires fun h -> live h b /\ i < length b /\ j < length b) (ensures fun h0 _ h1 -> modifies (loc_buffer b) h0 h1 /\ get h1 b i == get h0 b j /\ get h1 b j == get h0 b i)
val array_fill: b:buffer UInt8.t -> v:UInt8.t -> ST unit (requires fun h -> live h b) (ensures fun h0 _ h1 -> modifies (loc_buffer b) h0 h1 /\ (forall (i:nat). i < length b ==> get h1 b i == v))
val matrix_index: #n:nat -> #m:nat -> mx:matrix n m -> i:nat{i < n} -> j:nat{j < m} -> Tot elem
tactic_proof: let matrix_index #n #m mx i j = Seq.index (Seq.index mx i) j

goal: val matrix_transpose: #n:nat -> #m:nat -> mx:matrix n m -> Tot (matrix m n)
val dot_product: #n:nat -> v1:vector n -> v2:vector n -> Tot int
tactic_proof: let dot_product #n v1 v2 = fold_left (+) 0 (map2 ( * ) v1 v2)

goal: val array_sum_nonneg: b:buffer nat -> Lemma (requires forall (i:nat). i < length b ==> get h b i >= 0) (ensures array_sum b >= 0)
val option_left_id: #a:Type -> #b:Type -> x:a -> f:(a -> option b) -> Lemma (bind (Some x) f == f x)
tactic_proof: let option_left_id #a #b x f = ()

goal: val option_right_id: #a:Type -> x:option a -> Lemma (bind x Some == x)
tactic_proof: let option_right_id #a x = match x with | None -> () | Some _ -> ()

goal: val option_assoc: #a:Type -> #b:Type -> #c:Type -> x:option a -> f:(a -> option b) -> g:(b -> option c) -> Lemma (bind (bind x f) g == bind x (fun y -> bind (f y) g))
tactic_proof: let option_assoc #a #b #c x f g = match x with | None -> () | Some _ -> ()

goal: val either_left_id: #e:Type -> #a:Type -> #b:Type -> x:a -> f:(a -> either e b) -> Lemma (either_bind (Right x) f == f x)
tactic_proof: let either_left_id #e #a #b x f = ()

goal: val either_right_id: #e:Type -> #a:Type -> x:either e a -> Lemma (either_bind x Right == x)
tactic_proof: let either_right_id #e #a x = match x with | Left _ -> () | Right _ -> ()

goal: val state_left_id: #s:Type -> #a:Type -> #b:Type -> x:a -> f:(a -> state s b) -> Lemma (state_bind (state_return x) f == f x)
tactic_proof: let state_left_id #s #a #b x f = ()

goal: val string_length_append: s1:string -> s2:string -> Lemma (String.length (s1 ^ s2) == String.length s1 + String.length s2)
val string_sub_valid: s:string -> i:nat -> j:nat -> Lemma (requires i <= j /\ j <= String.length s) (ensures String.length (String.sub s i j) == j - i)
val utf8_encode_decode: s:string -> Lemma (utf8_decode (utf8_encode s) == Some s)
val split_join: s:string -> sep:string -> Lemma (requires String.length sep > 0) (ensures String.concat sep (String.split sep s) == s)
